patterns_applied.name: Terminology Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different field labels per coverage section (e.g., Reserve vs Outstanding)

patterns_applied.name: Special Characters
patterns_applied.description: Injected Unicode special chars in 5 claim descriptions

patterns_applied.name: Currency Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different currency formats per section ($1,234 vs 1234.56 vs em-dash for zero)

patterns_applied.name: Date Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different date formats per section (MM/DD/YYYY vs YYYY-MM-DD vs Mon DD, YYYY)

patterns_applied.name: Truncated Fields
patterns_applied.description: Truncated 1 description fields with ellipsis

patterns_applied.name: Name Variant
patterns_applied.description: Name variant: 'Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc.' → 'Great Lakes Freight Systems, Incorporated' for acord_28

patterns_applied.name: Address Mismatch
patterns_applied.description: Address variant: '1200 Nationwide Boulevard' → '1200 Nationwide Blvd.'

patterns_applied.name: Policy Number Format
patterns_applied.description: Reformatted 0 policy numbers for acord_28

patterns_applied.name: Date Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Date format set to dd-mmm-yyyy for acord_28

patterns_applied.name: Watermark Overlay
patterns_applied.description: Diagonal semi-transparent 'DRAFT' watermark across all pages

patterns_applied.name: Embedded Images
patterns_applied.description: Status icons (check/x/warning) replace text status in GL table cells

patterns_applied.name: Invisible OCR Text
patterns_applied.description: Render mode 3 (invisible) text at slightly offset positions

patterns_applied.name: Untagged Headers/Footers
patterns_applied.description: Header/footer text drawn directly on canvas without structure tags

patterns_applied.name: Fragmented Borders
patterns_applied.description: Table grid as many small overlapping line segments (Word export simulation)

patterns_applied.name: Non-Reading Order
patterns_applied.description: Text emitted right-to-left, bottom-to-top in content stream

patterns_applied.name: Kerning Spaces
patterns_applied.description: Words separated by TJ kerning offsets, no actual space characters in stream

patterns_applied.name: Broken CMap
patterns_applied.description: Fully scrambled ToUnicode CMap on Courier fonts

patterns_applied.name: OCG Hidden Layers
patterns_applied.description: Hidden OCG layer with extractable but invisible text

patterns_applied.name: Font Subset Corruption
patterns_applied.description: CMap missing mappings for digits 0, 5, 7

patterns_applied.name: Handwritten Elements
patterns_applied.description: Handwritten signature, date stamp, and margin annotations

patterns_applied.name: Heavy Degradation
patterns_applied.description: Heavy OCR degradation on 2/2 pages: rotation, blur, noise, scan lines, JPEG q25
